case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. ROBIN AGUILAR FRANCIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANCIS, ROBIN AGUILAR AKA ROBIN A FRANCIS FRANCIS JR, KEITH ERIC AKA KEITH FRANCIS JR $19,952.15 PRINCIPAL, $2,325.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $971.06 INTEREST, $593.85 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,842.06, SEE SCANNED DOC
